series_metadata.series_description: Includes performance evaluations, original payroll action sheets, deduction authorizations, letters relating to job performance, job audits, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Prior to 2010, after 5 years post-termination, relevant documents were microfilmed; microform records stored in the LSC safe. Beginning in 2010, relevant documents scanned into PDF format; permanently stored in online-archive on the LSC network. Paper copies and originals destroyed after microform or electronic copy checked for quality and completeness. ; Electronic: Prior to 2010, after 5 years post-termination, relevant documents were microfilmed; microform records stored in the LSC safe. Beginning in 2010, relevant documents scanned into PDF format; permanently stored in online-archive on the LSC network. Paper copies and originals destroyed after microform or electronic copy checked for quality and completeness. ; Paper: Retain file for each employee while employed by or on official leave from LSC. Keep as inactive file for 5 years after termination., Microform: Permanent ; Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
